positive: A highly detailed, whimsical illustration of a tiny cottage nestled deep within a bioluminescent forest. Include glowing mushrooms, gentle river mist, and friendly forest spirits. Storybook art style, vibrant colors, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, concept art, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, noise, grayscale
